mission_brief: Read the ecosystem, identify the highest-leverage project that compounds real-world impact, decompose it into workflows, delegate into the swarm, and resynthesize when work finishes quickly or ambiguity spikes.

selected_opportunity.title: Build ecological restoration coordination for AI carbon offset
selected_opportunity.thesis: Connect AI companies' compute footprints to verified ecological restoration projects staffed by displaced workers, with categorical accounting for trust and sheaf-theoretic coherence.
selected_opportunity.why_now: AI energy consumption is growing exponentially while job displacement accelerates. The system already has the mathematical infrastructure (sheaf cohomology, monadic composition, telos gates) to coordinate verified ecological restoration at scale. Evidence: jagat_kalyan.skill.md, JAGAT_KALYAN_MASTER_VISION.md, JAGAT_KALYAN_RECIPROCITY_COMMONS_2026-03-11.md

workflow.opportunity_title: Cohomology — Cechcohomology — To Sheaf Coordination build brief
workflow.thesis: Grounds the intersection of [CechCohomology, to_sheaf_coordination] via [cohomology, sheaf] Core concepts: CechCohomology, to_sheaf_coordination.
workflow.why_now: Campaign ledger already contains a hardened execution brief for this work. Promote it directly instead of generating a new generic workflow. Readiness=0.65.
